backend/main.mo: Motoko actor exposing a deduplication function that filters duplicate text lines using a Set and traps on empty input.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report listing three features, their affected files, components, test IDs, and confidence levels.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: Prewritten summaries describing numerous frontend files and their comic‑style UI, data, hooks, and utility roles.
frontend/index.css: Tailwind base/theme variables defining light and dark OKLCH color tokens and applying global background and border styles.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point defining the root container and loading the main React script.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component wiring providers, error boundary, controls, gallery, narration/listening tools, and the comic viewer.
frontend/src/components/AppErrorBoundary: React error boundary that catches runtime render errors and displays a comic‑styled recovery UI with reset and reload options.
frontend/src/components/CharactersGaller: Characters gallery rendering character artwork with fallback handling and localized section titles.
frontend/src/components/ComicPanel.tsx: Wrapper component for comic panels applying comic-themed layout, variants, and animation.
frontend/src/components/ComicParts.tsx: Set of styled components for captions, speech/thought bubbles, SFX text, and scene labels used inside comic panels.
frontend/src/components/ComicViewer.tsx: Renders all comic panels with localization, deduplication, progressive loading, and missing-image reporting.
Provides a button to localize comic data and export story and credits panels to a PDF.
frontend/src/components/Footer.tsx: Displays footer with copyright text, credits, and a referral link.
frontend/src/components/Header.tsx: Shows the comic title, subtitle, language selector, and theme toggle.
frontend/src/components/LanguageSelector: Dropdown for selecting the app’s language from available options.
frontend/src/components/RepetitionRemova: Toggle switch enabling or disabling panel text repetition removal.
frontend/src/components/StoryListeningCo: Controls speech recognition for listening mode and reports transcript and errors upward.
frontend/src/components/StoryNarrationCo: Configures and controls text‑to‑speech narration with localized scripts and voice selection.
Displays the transcript with word count and provides copy and clear actions.
frontend/src/components/VerifiedPanelIma: Image wrapper that reports load failures and swaps to a fallback placeholder image.
frontend/src/contexts/AppPreferencesCont: Stores and persists user language, author name, and timelineMode with setters and localStorage sync.
frontend/src/contexts/ComicSettingsConte: Provides a context for toggling repetitionRemovalEnabled for comic text processing.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Creates and refreshes a backend actor based on Internet Identity and invalidates dependent queries on change.
frontend/src/hooks/useI18n.ts: Returns a memoized translate function using the current language from preferences.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Manages Internet Identity login, stored identity loading, and exposes identity state and login status.
frontend/src/hooks/useMissingIllustratio: Tracks missing illustration filenames with safe reporting and reset functionality.
Manages incremental panel visibility with load more, load all, and reset controls.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Provides a mutation to deduplicate comic text using the backend actor and invalidates related queries.
Implements browser speech recognition with transcript handling, error reporting, and start/stop controls.
frontend/src/hooks/useSpeechSynthesisVoi: Loads available speech synthesis voices and tracks readiness via voiceschanged events.
frontend/src/hooks/useStoryNarration.ts: Controls text-to-speech narration of a script with voice selection, playback state, and error handling.
frontend/src/index.css: Defines Tailwind layers and custom comic-style themes, colors, typography, and component styles including speech bubbles and caption boxes.
frontend/src/lib/characters.ts: Exports character metadata with IDs, names, and artwork paths for Spider-Verse characters.
frontend/src/lib/comicData.ts: Provides structured chapter and panel data for the comic, including artwork, timestamps, and sample translations.
frontend/src/lib/comicLocalization.ts: Implements localization functions to translate chapter titles, panels, and panel parts based on language.
frontend/src/lib/comicModel.ts: Defines TypeScript models for comic panels, parts, chapters, and helper functions for text extraction and flattening.
frontend/src/lib/deduplication.ts: Adds utilities to deduplicate text lines and panel parts across panels and count total lines.
frontend/src/lib/i18n.ts: Provides translation dictionary loading, language normalization, and simple key-based translation functions.
frontend/src/lib/locales/de.ts: German translation dictionary containing UI strings for the comic viewer.
frontend/src/lib/locales/en.ts: English localization dictionary for all UI text, narration labels, controls, and PDF export strings.
frontend/src/lib/locales/es.ts: Spanish localization dictionary mirroring the English keys for UI, narration, controls, and PDF export.
frontend/src/lib/locales/fr.ts: French localization dictionary providing translated UI labels, narration text, controls, and PDF strings.
frontend/src/lib/locales/ja.ts: Japanese localization dictionary containing translations for UI sections, narration features, and PDF export labels.
frontend/src/lib/locales/zh.ts: Chinese localization dictionary covering UI text, narration options, controls, and PDF export fields.
frontend/src/lib/narration.ts: Generates a narration script from comic panels, converting parts to speakable items and optionally deduplicating repeated content.
frontend/src/lib/pdfExport.ts: Builds printable HTML for exporting the comic to PDF, applying deduplication, timestamps, and localized labels before triggering browser print.
frontend/src/lib/timeline.ts: Provides helpers to format timestamps and timestamp ranges for comic panels based on movie runtime.
frontend/src/lib/utils.ts: Exports a utility that merges class names using clsx and tailwind-merge.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Initializes the React app root, wrapping it with React Query and Internet Identity providers.
frontend/src/types/web-speech.d.ts: Defines ambient TypeScript types for the Web Speech API, including SpeechRecognition and related events.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Configures Tailwind with custom themes, colors, typography, animations, and plugin integrations.
project_state.json: Describes project state, known issues, feature requirements, and image adjustment needs for the Spider-Verse Comic Viewer.
